testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.quit()" because "testbase.BaseClass.driver" is null at testbase.BaseClass.tearDown(BaseClass.java:97) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 24 stack frames
